title: Carousel
description: A flexible and accessible carousel component built with Embla Carousel for displaying slides with horizontal, vertical, looping, and drag-free support.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install Embla Carousel for slider functionality.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a carousel component file and paste the carousel implementation.

usage.import: import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext } from '@shery-ui/components'

examples.title: Default Carousel
examples.description: A responsive horizontal carousel with navigation controls.

examples.title: Loop Carousel
examples.description: Centered carousel with infinite looping support.

examples.title: Drag Free Carousel
examples.description: Carousel with drag-free scrolling behavior for smoother interaction.

examples.title: Vertical Carousel
